description.initial: You have discovered the Ancient Ruins, the remains of a civilization that existed long before the merfolk. Their buildings are covered in coral and inhabited by fish. At the heart of the ruins, resting on a broken altar, you notice a carved stone that does not belong to this place. Another relic from a seeker who came before you.
description.return: The Ancient Ruins. A lost civilization sleeps beneath coral and time.
description.atmospheric: Mystery pervades every stone. Who built this place? Why did they vanish?

east.blockedMessage: The underwater realm ends at these ruins. Only ocean lies beyond.

items.itemMessage: You pick up the carved stone. It is heavier than it looks, etched with symbols you cannot read. The last trace of a seeker who vanished long ago.

interactables.name: Sunken Temple
interactables.examineText: The temple's architecture is unlike anything you've seen, angular and alien. Coral has softened its edges, but it still projects an air of ancient power.
